TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Maceo_Baston, title = Maceo_Baston, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maceo_Baston} }

S.FORM: Maceo Baston sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 5, Maceo Baston, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Maceo Baston sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 5, Maceo Baston, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: maʦ~ʨeo βas~ɕton s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, maʦ~ʨeo βas~ɕton, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
